description.value: Price 1,600 gp; Slot ring; CL 7th; Weight â; Aura moderate transmutation DESCRIPTION This sturdy ring allows the user to ignore the nonproficiency penalty for using a particular type of improvised weapon, such as a crowbar or pitchfork, and grants a +1 enhancement bonus on attack rolls with that item as though it were a masterwork weapon. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 800 gp; Feats Forge Ring; Spells masterwork transformation
